purpose: Generated-output proof for Wave70 mf70_forehead_skin mask routing using the active MOD-17 Canny v3 portrait as source.

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: very subtle photoreal forehead skin preservation pass, preserve exact face identity, preserve forehead skin tone, natural pore texture, smooth realistic lighting continuity, hairline shape, eyebrows, eyes, gaze direction, nose, mouth, cheeks, background, neck, and clothing unchanged
request_patch_values.negative_prompt: identity change, different person, age change, gender presentation change, face shape drift, skin tone change, forehead shape change, hairline change, hair volume change, eyebrow change, eye color change, gaze drift, distorted eyes, nose deformation, changed lips, neck change, clothing change, background change, plastic skin, waxy skin, over-smoothed forehead, visible seam, blotchy skin, watermark, text

qa_focus: forehead skin texture and lighting continuity
hairline, eyebrows, eyes, and gaze protection
no visible seam around the forehead mask boundary
hair, neck, background, and clothing protection

source_qa_driver.change_summary: Use the Wave70 forehead-skin mask as the inpaint mask with very low denoise to prove local generated-output routing while minimizing hairline, eyebrow, and identity drift.
